subject: maths
title: 18N.1.SL.TZ0.S_3
question_html:
In an arithmetic sequence, u1 = −5 and d = 3.

Find u8.
solution_html:
* This question is from an exam for a previous syllabus, and may contain minor differences in marking or structure.

correct working      (A1)

eg   −5 + (8 − 1)(3)

u8 = 16     A1 N2

 

[2 marks]
